description: Expose the code intelligence capabilities of the IDE as callable tool interfaces through the MCP (Model Context Protocol).
view.debug.name: MCP Debug
config.title: IDE-LSP for MCP
config.autoStart.description: Auto start MCP server when VSCode starts
config.contextLines.description: Number of context lines to show(2n+1)
config.nearestSymbolsCount.description: Number of nearest symbols to suggest when symbol validation fails
config.maxStructLines.description: Maximum output lines for file/symbol structure in auto mode
